verifiedTranscriptOpening: Thank you for calling the Child Advocacy Center of Greater Rochester. If you are calling during regular business hours, which are Monday through Friday, from 830 a.m. to 5 p.m., please leave a message

webVerification.sourceLabel: Bivona Child Advocacy Center / Child Advocacy Center of Greater Rochester
webVerification.notes: Multi-source web confirmation: 585-935-7800 = Bivona Child Advocacy Center / Child Advocacy Center of Greater Rochester (Skalny Building, 1 Mt Hope Ave, Rochester NY 14620). Direct fetch of bivonacac.org failed cert verification; cacgroc.org omitted phone — relied on Bivona's BASWA listing + CCSI listing + 211/OVS listing. Direct match to dialer transcript opening ("Child Advocacy Center of Greater Rochester").
